channel.title: examples on ilo
channel.description: Recent content in examples on ilo

item.title: Examples
item.description: The following examples show how ilo shell can be used. Cargo Projects Cargo caches all downloaded dependencies in your local ~/.cargo directory. In order to re-use already downloaded dependencies inside the container, specify a --volumne like this: # Gradle project that mounts local .gradle folder $ ilo shell \ --volume $HOME/.cargo:/root/.cargo:Z \ rust:latest Gradle Projects Gradle caches all downloaded dependencies in your local ~/.gradle directory. In order to re-use already downloaded dependencies inside the container, specify a --volumne like this:
